reviews.comment:
A los baños le faltaba limpieza
Aún así los playeros muy amables

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms needed cleaning.
Even so, the beach staff were very friendly.

reviews.comment:
No respetan orden de carga; siempre se rompe bomba NAFTA súper, parece ser estrategia para solo vender otros combustible más caro

(Translated by Google)
They don't respect the loading order; the pump for premium gasoline is always breaking down, it seems to be a strategy to only sell other, more expensive fuels.

reviews.comment:
Debería haber un playero que solo se dedique a cobrar, así agiliza el movimiento. Porque tardan muchísimo en cobrar cuando es por tarjeta

(Translated by Google)
There should be a beach attendant dedicated solely to taking payments; it would speed things up. Because card payments take forever to process.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0MmFLbDN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar soñado! Lindas habitaciones y hermosos alrededores! Unas vistas increíbles de día y de noche! Buen desayuno y atención por parte de quienes atienden. Da para quedarse varios días disfrutando de la pileta.

(Translated by Google)
Dream location! Beautiful rooms and stunning surroundings! Incredible views day and night! Great breakfast and attentive service. You can stay for several days enjoying the pool.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0eXV6SExBEAE

reviews.comment:
Tengan en cuenta esto. Me paso que dos días no hubo combustible en la estación de servicio YPF de Cachi por las dudas lleven uno 10 litros para regresar si su consumo es alto.

(Translated by Google)
Keep this in mind. I had no fuel at the YPF gas station in Cachi for two days. Just in case, bring 10 liters of fuel with you to return if your fuel consumption is high.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOM2FqTmlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención es excelente por parte de la gente muy amabables y cordiales. Se puede pagar con tarjetas. Lo único tengan paciencia se toman su tiempo para despachar.

(Translated by Google)
